---
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ieee_tcasi.csl
nocite: |
  @*
---

<div class="pub-controls" aria-label="Publication controls">
  <input id="pub-search" type="search" placeholder="Search publications..." aria-label="Search publications">
  <select id="pub-type" aria-label="Filter by type">
    <option value="all">All types</option>
    <option value="journal">Journal</option>
    <option value="conference">Conference</option>
  </select>
  <select id="pub-year-filter" aria-label="Filter by year">
    <option value="all">All years</option>
  </select>
</div>

::: {#refs}
:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const refs = document.querySelector("#refs");
  if (!refs) return;

  const nameRegex = /\b(Yi Huang|Y\.?\s*Huang|Huang,\s*Yi|Huang,\s*Y\.?)\b/g;
  const rawEntries = Array.from(refs.querySelectorAll(".csl-entry"));

  const entries = rawEntries.map((entry, index) => {
    const rightInline = entry.querySelector(".csl-right-inline");
    const authorNode = Array.from(rightInline?.childNodes || []).find(
      (node) => node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && (node.textContent || "").trim()
    );
    entry.innerHTML = entry.innerHTML.replace(nameRegex, "<strong>$1</strong>");
    entry.querySelectorAll("i, em").forEach((el) => {
      if (el.closest("strong")) return;
      const strong = document.createElement("strong");
      el.parentNode.insertBefore(strong, el);
      strong.appendChild(el);
    });
    const text = entry.textContent || "";
    const yearMatches = text.match(/\b(19|20)\d{2}\b/g) || [];
    const year = yearMatches.length ? Number(yearMatches[yearMatches.length - 1]) : null;
    const type = /proceedings|conference|symposium|workshop|proc\.?/i.test(text)
      ? "conference"
      : "journal";
    return { entry, text: text.toLowerCase(), year, type, index };
  });

  const searchInput = document.querySelector("#pub-search");
  const typeSelect = document.querySelector("#pub-type");
  const yearFilter = document.querySelector("#pub-year-filter");

  const years = Array.from(
    new Set(entries.map((item) => item.year).filter((year) => year !== null))
  ).sort((a, b) => b - a);

  if (yearFilter) {
    for (const year of years) {
      const option = document.createElement("option");
      option.value = String(year);
      option.textContent = String(year);
      yearFilter.appendChild(option);
    }
  }

  function render() {
    const query = (searchInput?.value || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    const type = typeSelect?.value || "all";
    const yearValue = yearFilter?.value || "all";
    let filtered = entries.filter((item) => {
      const matchesQuery = !query || item.text.includes(query);
      const matchesType = type === "all" || item.type === type;
      const matchesYear =
        yearValue === "all" || String(item.year) === yearValue;
      return matchesQuery && matchesType && matchesYear;
    });

    filtered.sort((a, b) => a.index - b.index);

    refs.innerHTML = "";
    for (const item of filtered) {
      refs.appendChild(item.entry);
    }
  }

  searchInput?.addEventListener("input", render);
  typeSelect?.addEventListener("change", render);
  yearFilter?.addEventListener("change", render);
  render();
});
</script>
